assertion_results.text: Version impact table shows NO (not affected) for all supported versions — every version ships a dependency version outside the CVE's affected range
assertion_results.evidence: In version-impact.md, Step 2.4 'Version Impact Table' lists all 7 supported versions (2.1.0, 2.1.1, 2.2.0, 2.2.1, 2.2.2, 2.2.3, 2.2.4) with Affected? column showing 'NO' for every row. Each entry notes the serde_json version (1.0.137-1.0.139) is >= 1.0.135 (the fix threshold). The file concludes: 'Result: NO supported versions are affected. All versions across all streams ship serde_json >= 1.0.135, which is at or above the fix threshold.'

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing as Not a Bug with resolution, not creating remediation tasks (Step 7 Case C)
assertion_results.evidence: In triage-outcome.md, the Outcome field states 'Case C — No supported versions affected. Close as Not a Bug.' Section '2. Transition TC-8002 to Closed' specifies Resolution: 'Not a Bug'. The Remediation Tasks section states: 'None required. No supported versions are affected by CVE-2026-28940... This is a Case C outcome — close the Vulnerability issue as Not a Bug with no remediation tasks.'

assertion_results.text: The close recommendation includes a comment documenting the version impact evidence — listing each version and its dependency version as proof of non-impact
assertion_results.evidence: In triage-outcome.md, section '1. Add comment to TC-8002' contains a proposed comment with a full version impact table listing all 7 versions (2.1.0 through 2.2.4) with their stream, serde_json version (1.0.137-1.0.139), and Affected? status (all NO). The comment text states: 'All supported versions ship serde_json >= 1.0.137 which is outside the affected range (versions before 1.0.135). No remediation required. Closing as Not a Bug — not affected.'

assertion_results.text: VEX Justification is set to 'Component not Present' or appropriate value when the VEX field is configured (Step 7 VEX Justification)
assertion_results.evidence: In triage-outcome.md, section '3. Set VEX Justification' specifies: Value: 'Component not Present', with Rationale: 'The vulnerable version of serde_json (< 1.0.135) is not present in any supported product version. All versions ship serde_json >= 1.0.137.' The VEX field customfield_12345 is configured per data-extraction.md Step 0.

assertion_results.text: The analysis does NOT create any remediation tasks — no upstream backport, no downstream propagation (Step 7 Case C closes the issue)
assertion_results.evidence: In triage-outcome.md, the Remediation Tasks section explicitly states: 'None required. No supported versions are affected by CVE-2026-28940. All versions already ship serde_json at or above the fix threshold (1.0.135). This is a Case C outcome — close the Vulnerability issue as Not a Bug with no remediation tasks.' No task creation actions appear anywhere in the Proposed Jira Actions — only comment, transition to closed, set VEX, add label, and assign.
